subject: nsys profile attempt: exit -1 root cause + corrected script
issue: Your nsys test used --trace=none which disables ALL tracing. nsys exits -1 with no output when nothing is traced.
fix: Use --trace=cuda instead. Also --sample=none and --cpuctxsw=none are fine (skip CPU sampling which needs admin).
correct_command: & 'C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\Nsight Systems 2026.2.1\target-windows-x64\nsys.exe' profile -t cuda --sample=none --cpuctxsw=none -x true --force-overwrite=true --stats=true -o S:\kernel-lane\profiles\nsys\baseline S:\kernel-lane\build\Release\profile_target.exe
headless_status: Kernel lane accepts partial convergence for v0.1.0. nsys report is the only missing evidence type.
